1600.description: Mainly used on a medium and large device
Mainly used on a medium and large device

regular.description: We can use regular easing when an object is visible from the beginning to the end of a motion

entry.description: We can use entry easing when an object is coming into view. So, it can be used for appearing modal, toast, etc

exit.description: We can use exit easing when an object is moving out of view. For example, closing a toast, modal, or dropdown

linear.description: We can use linear for color transformations or for changing the opacity of the object

display.description: The largest text on the screen, display style is reserved for short, important text or numerals. They work best on large screens.

h1.description: Reserved for main headlines and titles.

base.description: Reserved for subtitles or minor levels of hierarchy.

sm.description: Reserved for subtitles or minor levels of hierarchy.

default.description: Components that are higher to draw a little more attention to themselves, but not much. They may have some interaction inside of it (card information in summary, autocomplete, dropdown).
